  • We are back! Better than before!

    Feel free to register on our M2Bob Forum and join our M2Bob Discord if you have any questions.

    This tool works with the newest version from all european servers (GB, RO, TR, DE, PL, GR, IT, CZ, etc.) as well as on SG and most other Servers.

    For a full list which servers are working, click here: Serverlist Click here if you want to see the features of M2Bob: Features

    Register an account on our website, to see hidden content.
